notes: CSP picks for week of Jul 21-25. Execute when deposit clears.

picks.comment: Full CSP — 100 shares collateral if assigned
picks.note: INTC at $95. Dropped -18% from $116. Support at $90. Good premium at 5% OTM.
picks.win_logic: INTC stays above $90 = keep premium. Price recovers = bonus upside on stock.
picks.loss_logic: INTC drops below $85 = might exit early, take small loss. $90 support is strong.

picks.comment: Full CSP — 100 shares collateral if assigned
picks.note: NOK at $10.10. Dropped -21%. Support at $9.50. Solid oversold bounce candidate.
picks.win_logic: NOK stays above $9.50 = keep premium. Bounces back to $11 = great entry.
picks.loss_logic: Drops below $9 = might exit early. Support at $9.50 is key level.

execution.step_2: Monday Jul 21 morning — check INTC price
execution.step_3: If INTC above $93 → SELL 1 INTC $90 put
execution.step_4: If INTC below $92 → SKIP, go to NOK $9.50 put
execution.step_5: Close CSP at 50% profit OR let expire Friday
